mapper.select:
select * from news_article
status = 4
and category_id = #{categoryId}
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by like_count desc, comment_count desc, favorite_count desc
order by hot_score desc, publish_time desc

select * from news_article where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into news_article (title, summary, cover_url, category_id, author_id, author_type, status, publish_time, view_count, like_count, dislike_count, favorite_count, comment_count, hot_score, reject_reason, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{categoryId}, #{authorId}, #{authorType}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{hotScore}, #{rejectReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select * from news_article where status = 4
order by view_count desc order by like_count desc order by like_count desc, comment_count desc, favorite_count desc order by hot_score desc
limit 10
